---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
Explain the use case or problem this feature would solve. Why do you need this feature?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. Include code examples if possible.

### Example Usage
```rust
// How you would like to use this feature
use anilist_moe::AniListClient;

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() {
    let client = AniListClient::new();
    // Example of how the new feature would be used
}
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## AniList API Support
- [ ] This feature is supported by the AniList API
- [ ] This is a convenience wrapper around existing functionality
- [ ] This is a new utility feature for the library

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Are you willing to contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I need help implementing this
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea

## References
(Optional) Links to relevant AniList API documentation, similar implementations in other libraries, etc.
